title: Run QA pass for story-site draft
goal: Verify narrative website quality across functionality, content integrity, and accessibility baseline.

steps.text: Review latest build and architecture review notes.
Execute functional, content, and accessibility checks.
Record findings with severity and reproduction context.
Pause for review on high-severity defects before VQA stage.

acceptanceCriteria: High-severity defects are surfaced before VQA

verification.text: Confirm QA report is complete and linked to required artifact location
